summary: The diff implements a Tinder-style profile card header component (ProfileCardHeader.tsx) that is integrated into both EconomistRevealCard and StatementSlide. The implementation covers nearly all acceptance criteria for REQ-1: name in large bold typography, era/dates, school-of-thought tag, full-bleed gradient background, white overlaid text at bottom-left, and a 'Design Preview' watermark. The data layer (slides.ts, types/slides.ts) is updated with era and school fields for all economists. The deployed link AC cannot be verified from the diff alone.

missing_requirements.requirement: A shareable deployed link is produced after deployment.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff contains only source code changes. There is no evidence of a deployment step, CI/CD configuration change, or a recorded shareable URL anywhere in the diff.

hallucinated_features.description: A blurred/mystery Tinder-style teaser card is shown in StatementSlide before the user swipes, hiding the economist identity with blur and a 'Mystery Economist' overlay.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention a pre-swipe mystery/blurred state. REQ-1 only asks for a Tinder-style profile card header on each card; the mystery teaser is an additional interaction pattern not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: An optional 'badge' prop (e.g. 'Economist Match') is added to ProfileCardHeader and rendered as a top-right badge on EconomistRevealCard.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not request a badge or 'Economist Match' label on the card header. This is an addition beyond the specified requirements.
